note: Each arm's system prompt is the only difference between runs. baseline has none; codecraft reads the local skill; ponytail and code-simplifier are fetched from their own repositories at run time (not redistributed here). Those systemUrl values track the upstream default branch, so a run reflects that branch as of the run date; pin them to a commit SHA for a byte-reproducible re-run. code-simplifier is two-pass: write, then refine.
